title: Mahagun Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mahagun Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
